title: HMAS Gilolo
summary: HMAS Gilolo is a former Royal Australian Navy (RAN) shore naval base on Gililo (now Halmahera),  in the Maluku Islands, Dutch East Indies (now Indonesia).
text: HMAS Gilolo is a former Royal Australian Navy (RAN) shore naval base on Gililo (now Halmahera),  in the Maluku Islands, Dutch East Indies (now Indonesia).
